programs.title: Bright Now
programs.desc: Food Anthropologist Dr. Bill Schindler is on an international quest to discover what we should eat. He and his family uncover ancient culinary practices and show how they can bring simplicity and good health to the modern kitchen.

programs.title: Bright Now
programs.desc: Current research in nutrition points to our diet as the most important factor in continued good health and longevity. Doctors, chefs, and nutritionists show us how going green with fresh ingredients and flavors in our daily meals will improve our health.

programs.title: Cooking the Perfect Burger
programs.desc: Meet Alex McCoy, an award-winning chef on a mission to perfect an American classic: the hamburger. He'll walk you through his tips and tricks to craft the perfect burger.

programs.title: Cooking the Ultimate Steak
programs.desc: Award-winning chef Alex McCoy tests a variety of methods to ensure that you cook the ultimate steak right from your home.

programs.title: The History of Food
programs.desc: Humans have depended on fire for millennia, but do we fully understand the impact it has had on our diet.

programs.title: The History of Food
programs.desc: From the first row of planted crops, the practice of agriculture rendered man's hunter-gatherer lifestyles obsolete in favor of settled life and stable food supplies.
